description: Treat this as the missing commercial discovery capability, not cleanup of a mature pipeline. Replace Commercial.DiscoveryPipeline seed replay as the scheduled production behavior by calling the existing bounded Exa search, dedupe, ranking, and candidate-persistence logic for a DiscoveryProgram. Route both scheduler and manual program launch through one intent-named Ash interface; preserve operator review and do not auto-promote. Keep seed_candidates only as an explicit test fixture until legacy retirement. Acceptance: a scheduled-program integration test with an Exa fixture starts from program industries/regions/search terms, performs live-search-shaped execution, persists LeadPreviewRun/candidates plus Acquisition findings and provenance, respects the existing per-run spend ceiling, and proves zero manually seeded candidates are required.
title: Connect scheduled commercial discovery to live Exa search
